metadata.task_title: Adding an image to a PowerPoint Presentation Slide
metadata.instruction: Add the photo Task ID 62.jpg to Task ID 62.pptx, both in Document > Task 62 folder.
metadata.context: I want to add a picture of myself to the presentation

l3.rationale: Win key opens the launcher/start interface.

l4.rationale: Uses Run and File Explorer to reach the Documents location and open the Task 62 folder.

l5.rationale: This span opens windows, types paths/queries, scrolls, and selects the image file in Document > Task 62, preparing the source photo for the insert task.

focused_element.name: Be careful—files from the Internet can contain viruses. Unless you need to edit, it's safer to stay in Protected View.
